## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Affected area

## Checklist

- [ ] One topical change; clear commit messages.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Docs follow `DOCUMENTATION-STANDARD.md` (sentence-case headings, **no emojis in headings**,
      GitHub alerts instead of emoji callouts).
- [ ] Internal links resolve; no doc–code drift introduced.
- [ ] For a new audit template: follows the house structure (Mission, principles, P0–P3 severity,
      Phase 0–5, finding schema, mandatory issue output, Definition of Done).
